mapper.select: SELECT id, cache_key, prompt, form_code, sql_result, create_time FROM sql_cache WHERE cache_key = #{cacheKey} AND create_time >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sql_cache (cache_key, prompt, form_code, sql_result, create_time) VALUES (#{cacheKey}, #{prompt}, #{formCode}, #{sqlResult}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sql_cache WHERE create_time < datetime('now', '-' || #{days} || ' days')
